mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_project WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM t_project WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' AND is_featured = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM t_project ORDER BY sort_order ASC, created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_project (id, title, description, url, github_url, cover_image, tags, is_featured, sort_order, status) VALUES (#{id}, #{title}, #{description}, #{url}, #{githubUrl}, #{coverImage}, #{tags}, #{isFeatured}, #{sortOrder}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_project SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, url = #{url}, github_url = #{githubUrl}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, tags = #{tags}, is_featured = #{isFeatured}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE t_project SET is_featured = #{featured} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE t_project SET sort_order = #{sortOrder} WHERE id = #{id}
